title: Integrate Pooled App with Cloudflare Worker Auth Flow
description:
Phase 4 of the Cloudflare Worker auth migration (Epic MBT-1260). Integrate the pooled Laravel application with the new Cloudflare Worker-based authentication flow.

### Tasks
- Implement `/auth/consume` endpoint in the Laravel app
- Create server-to-server code exchange with the auth service
- Set up host-only session cookies
- Implement tenant scoping in the pooled app
- Add organization_id/tenant_id extraction from session

### Deliverables
- Laravel auth consume endpoint
- Session management with host-only cookies
- Tenant scoping implementation for pooled multi-tenant architecture
acceptance_criteria: Laravel /auth/consume endpoint accepts and validates handoff codes from Cloudflare Worker
Server-to-server code exchange securely retrieves user/tenant context
Host-only session cookies are properly scoped
Tenant scoping correctly isolates data per organization_id/tenant_id
middleware_changes: New /auth/consume endpoint for Cloudflare Worker handoff code exchange. Session management with host-only cookies. Tenant scoping via organization_id/tenant_id extraction.
api_changes: POST /auth/consume — accepts handoff code, exchanges server-to-server for user/tenant context, establishes session.
implementation_notes: Part of Epic MBT-1260. Requires Cloudflare Worker (Phase 2) to be deployed first.
